description: Small bifolio probably from a court ledger or communal record. One page is alphabet practice. The facing page reports that a group assembled in the synagogue on Monday, the 6th of Kislev 14[..] or 15[..] Seleucid. On the righthand page of verso, there is a list of items with their values, and someone acknowledging that he purchased them. On the lefthand page of verso, there is another list of items brought by the cantor (al-ḥazzan al-mumḥe) R. Ṣadoq. AA/ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
